content.rendered:
[vc_row triangle_shape=”no”][vc_column width=”1/4″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″]

As soon as she told me how her lawyer was treating her and her case I immediately recommended you guys. Thanks for being awesome teammates in justice!

Michael Murphy, Jr., took care of my case involving personal injury. During this time I found him to be a good listener, caring attorney, professional and very helpful. He paid attention to detail that was important to the case and worked hard for a successful outcome. I highly recommend Michael Murphy Jr. for his excellent service to me involving my case.

Highly ethical, highly experienced and will go to bat for you! So, if you've ever been in a situation where you really needed a lawyer, then you know what I'm talking about. Michael Murphy has 30+ years extensive experience in the legal field and great reputation in the community.

Mike is very knowledgeable and professional. He is prompt in his responses, and always knows how to get the best end results.

I've known the Murphy family for over 10 years and they are genuine hardworking and kind. I finally needed their representation when I was hit by a car this year. I had a bad experience with another firm (no direct attention) and mike murphy was giving me advice along the way. I decided to switch firms and hire the murphy's instead. they held my hand through this terrible traumatic time in my life so i was able to focus on healing (my bad injuries). they got all my medical bills handled as well as settling with my health insurance to negotiate the best they could with the driver who hit me low insurance policy. they walked me through everything and made sure signed off before anything was agreed. I truly feel like they put in the extra efforts to make sure every detail was handled properly. they even paid off all my bills with the settlement money so when it finally was over I could move on with my life and not have to deal with anymore drama. I would recommend them for any case you need representation from. this is coming from someone that had an experience with a larger firm and knows the difference. they actually care about their clients. i now will never use anyone else for legal issues. they are the best! thank you thank you!

I could not have attained better legal representation than what I received from the "Murphy Team". Their dedication, integrity and overall perseverance put forth on my behalf was nothing short of exceptional. This law firm is extremely detailed and thorough with their research and preparation to ensure all legal parameters are utilized in order that the best outcome is realized. In addition, their litigation expertise and conduct is nothing short of outstanding! Bottom line, you will be in good hands with the "Chuckstern Murphy Law Firm" given any circumstance that legal work is needed. They took a personal interest in my case, I truly feel and believe I would not have received this level of professionalism with a larger law firm. I so appreciate the time & dedication put forth on my case...

I can't say enough good things about this law firm. My wife and I were in a tough situation and Mike Murphy Jr. came to the rescue. Not only did we get the council we needed on the matter, Mike kept us informed on how the whole process worked and what we should expect. This was not the first time I needed a lawyer and It is never a comfortable situation when going to court or even be in a legal dispute but I have to say that the law offices of Michael C Murphy was the right choice. My previous experience was not great and now that I have a comparison working with the Murphy Law offices I can confirm, not all lawyers are equal. Mike Murphy Jr. is extremely professional and keeps you well informed. He is honest, trustworthy and you can see how hard he works with how well prepared he is. If you ever need a lawyer I highly recommended using these guys, true professionals.

I recently had to deal with a probate from a death in the family I did my research and looked around for a law firm to suit my needs and I came across The Law Offices of Michael C Murphy from the beginning to the end Michael Murphy made this process as smooth as it could possibly be I've dealt with lawyers before but this home grown family firm is by far the most professional firm i have ever encountered If anyone is in need of a firm look no further and call these guys

Very happy with the work of Michael Jr & Sr. They gave me helpful advice for the legal matters I came in for. I would highly recommend their law firm and will certainly come back to them in the future.

Great service! Michael Murphy helped me get my money back from a company that billed me for 9 months of services all at once after canceling my contract. I would highly recommend both Michael's to anyone seeking advice / help!

I would highly recommend this law firm to anyone seeking legal advice. We used them for a family law case that has turned to a fraud case. They are knowledgeable, professional, detail oriented and write excellent briefs. They explained all the intricacies of the case in plain language to use. Your case is in good hands with them.

Best decision I made after an accident was to hire the Law Offices of Michael Murphy. On our first meeting they explained what the process would be and it turned out to be exactly what happened. I didn't have the knowledge and experience to watch out for my own best interests; they did. They explained everything along the way, offered their advice and opinion and then let me make the final choices. Very responsive, professional and honest. Highly recommended.

[/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/4″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row triangle_shape=”no”][vc_column][vc_empty_space][/vc_column][/vc_row]
